title: ShowConfirmation Property
description: Sets / returns whether to display a confirmation dialog at calibration.
notes:
Sets / returns whether to display a confirmation dialog at calibration if point teaching is not completed. This property does not need to be set since normally the point teaching is done by the VCalPoints statement.

Set this parameter to "False" and call the VCal statement in cases such as when updating the point teaching positions for calibration by using the external data.

See Also: ShowConfirmation Property
